creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Upgrading of port [graphics/mesa-dri] from v18.1.8 to v18.1.8_1 fails on deinstallation task.

Following error could be detected:
--->  Deinstalling 'mesa-dri-18.1.8'
--->  Preserving /usr/local/lib/libXvMCr600.so.1 as /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libXvMCr600.so.1
cp: symlink: libXvMCr600.so.1.0.0: File exists
Copy failed!
